sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19801" key="bembrafu/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βεμβρᾰφύη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n19801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a dish of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεμβράδες</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">and</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀφύαι</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0420.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristonym.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
